title: Mirza Ghalib
writer: Rajinder Singh Bedi, Saadat Hassan Manto, J.K. Nanda
plot: This movie depicts the life of once wealthy poet and nobleman Mirza Ghalib. This story portrays his trials, tribulations, triumphs, and utlimate descent to poverty, and then to prison; and his tragic and ill-fated love with a beau...
